name: Mishler Birdie Barn
address: 6091 County Rd 207 building b, Millersburg, OH 44654
about: Mishler Birdie Barn is an indoor golf facility located in Holmes County, OH, offering a climate-controlled environment for golfers to play on virtual courses and practice their swing. The venue provides state-of-the-art swing tracking data, access to world-renowned golf courses like TPC Sawgrass and Augusta National, and a snack bar for refreshments. It features a large, undulated putting green for dedicated practice and aims to be a comprehensive golf destination for players of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to famous virtual courses like TPC Sawgrass and Augusta National
Comprehensive swing analytics including carry distances, club speed, and video replay
On-site snack bar and a dedicated putting green for a full experience

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks are available from the on-site snack bar.
Beverages are available from the snack bar.

simulator_hardware.notes: The website mentions state-of-the-art swing tracking technology but does not specify the hardware brand.

faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether they offer club rentals, so it is recommended to call ahead.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a snack bar available, but it does not specify if outside food or drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the duration of an 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Mishler Birdie Barn is family-friendly and welcomes golfers of all ages.
